name: io.github.proappstore-online/proappstore
title: ProAppStore
description: 35 AI agent tools for building, managing, and querying Pro web apps. Create apps, scaffold from templates, manage Agent Teams projects, chat with PO/Architect agents, read SDK docs, get code recipes, run tests, and query app databases.

tools.name: sdk_reference
tools.description: SDK reference for auth, db, storage, maps, AI, rooms, hooks, UI, recipes, design system

tools.name: recipe
tools.description: 19 pre-built code recipes (CRUD, forms, modals, maps, AI chat, notifications)

tools.name: scaffold_app
tools.description: Create a new Pro app from template

tools.name: create_app
tools.description: Create an Agent Teams project (AI-powered build)

tools.name: chat_agent
tools.description: Chat with PO or Architect agent

tools.name: add_ticket
tools.description: Add a ticket to the project backlog
